Rate Us

Short CV

Born in 1995 in Adıyaman, Research Assistant, with her double major program, Seher SAV completed Üsküdar University Child Development Department (Full scholarship) in 2018 and Üsküdar University Psychology Department (Full scholarship) with a high honors degree.

Between 2019-2020, As a Child Developmentalist and Psychologist she conducted Psychosocial studies especially for parents in a private Education and Rehabilitation Center.

In 2020, She started to work as a Research Assistant at the Department of Child Development, Faculty of Health Sciences, Üsküdar University. She carries out her academic studies in the field of cultural and individual differences.
